next_steps: Obtain peripheral blood, urine, and nasopharyngeal cultures
Initiate empiric intravenous antibiotics (e.g., ceftriaxone and vancomycin) pending culture results
Perform complete blood count with differential, coagulation panel, and metabolic panel
Consult pediatric infectious disease and cardiology teams
Conduct lumbar puncture if hemodynamically stable and no coagulopathy is present
